emotional_tone: Elegant, calm, spiritual, minimalist, premium, mystical.
design_philosophy: Embrace the void. Let deep black space breathe. Use jade/emerald as light cutting through the darkness. The ancient wisdom of BaZi and I Ching should feel modern, authoritative, and profoundly personal.

typography.heading_font: Cormorant Garamond, Playfair Display, or native serif equivalent. Should be elegant and authoritative.
typography.body_font: Outfit, Manrope, or Inter (light variants). Must be highly legible.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous vertical spacing. Let elements breathe. Do not cram inputs together in the Birth Input form. Use full-width cards with inner padding for the Reading Results sections.

surface_strategies.cards: Dark Jade background (#0C1814) with a 1px solid border (#1A2F28). No harsh shadows, use a soft, diffuse emerald ambient glow only on premium/active elements.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: For sticky headers or floating nav bars, use deep black/jade backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#040907]/80) with a 1px bottom border of white/10.
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: Solid emerald background, text white. Rounded full (pill shape) for premium feel. Do not use generic square buttons.
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: Transparent background, 1px emerald-700 border, emerald text.
surface_strategies.inputs: Height 56px, fully rounded (rounded-full) or smooth corners (rounded-xl). Background #0C1814, border #1A2F28. Focus state border turns solid emerald (#10B981).

landing_page.structure: Hero image filling top half with gradient fade into background. Bold serif H1. Floating 'Get Your Reading' CTA.
landing_page.effects: Parallax background if possible, soft fade-ins for text.

birth_input_form.structure: Single column, well-spaced fields. Use clear overline labels. Combine Year/Month/Day creatively or use native date pickers styled in dark mode.
birth_input_form.guidance: Must not feel like a tax form. It is the beginning of a mystical journey. Use step-by-step or generously padded vertical layout.

reading_result.structure: Bento-grid inspired or stacked elegant cards. Each section (Five Elements, Career, Health, I Ching) must be its own card with a distinct icon and serif header.
reading_result.visuals: Use the I Ching hexagram image or Element image to break up text.

paywall.structure: Cinematic. Dark overlay over a mystical background. Large Gold or Emerald CTA to 'Upgrade to Premium'. 'Maybe Later' as subtle text below.
paywall.psychology: Should feel like unlocking deep secrets, not just buying a subscription.

mystical_jade_background.description: Premium pure dark background with soft, ethereal jade green and emerald gradients glowing faintly. Use for Landing Page hero background or Paywall background.

five_elements_hero.description: Abstract 3D geometric representation of Chinese Five Elements in emerald and gold. Use in the Reading Results page under the 'Five Elements balance' section.

iching_compass.description: Glowing minimal I Ching hexagram in faint gold. Use in the 'I Ching guidance' section of the Reading Results or as a loading state graphic.

starry_night_stock.description: Dark night sky. Use as a subtle texture or overlay if needed for dashboard headers.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="reading-submit-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native mobile app utilizing SDK 54 and expo-router. All styling MUST be compatible with NativeWind (or React Native StyleSheet if NativeWind is not available).
Translate Tailwind guidelines into NativeWind classes or equivalent StyleSheet properties.
Since it's mobile, rely on ScrollView and SafeAreaView. Use `paddingHorizontal: 24` for standard screen padding.
Text over gradients/images MUST have high contrast. Use dark overlays over the provided background images if needed.
Do not use generic 'card' looks. The app must feel like a premium, mystical experience. Use the specified dark emerald/obsidian colors.
Include the footer disclaimer on all major screens: 'For reflection and entertainment only. Not professional advice.' Give it a muted, small font style.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all buttons, inputs, and major sections.
